title: Chinese AI is now on par with Anthropic in terms of cybersecurity: report

title: South Korea to invest nearly $1.2 trillion in chips, AI data centers
description: SEOUL — South Korea will invest nearly $1.2 trillion — equivalent to more than two-thirds of its gross domestic product (GDP) — in a new chip-building hub and artificial intelligence (AI) data centers over several years, as it seeks to profit from soaring demand while developing previously neglected regions.

title: British American Tobacco cost cutting hits 9,000 roles

title: AI Is Trimming Tech Cost But Hitting Hiring Volumes As Well, Says Fractal CEO
description: Fractal CEO Srikanth Velamakanni says artificial intelligence is making technology cheaper and transforming recruitment, even as entry-level hiring slows.
content:
